input:
Braindump:
schedule annual physical, meal prep for the week, research ADHD medication options with psychiatrist notes, go for a 30 min walk, cancel the sugary snack subscription, organize supplements cabinet, book a therapy appointment, read 20 pages of the ADHD book

Focus: Health
Date: 2026-03-13
description: Health-focused braindump. The skill must adapt the impact axis to 'Health' instead of 'Money'. Walk and meal prep are low-energy health-movers (Do First). Psychiatrist research and therapy booking are high-energy health-movers (Block Time). Supplement organization is low-energy non-health (Batch). Reading the book is high-energy non-health-urgent (Kill or maybe Batch depending on classification).
rationale: Tests the configurable focus axis with a non-default focus.
